rulings.Case Title: CHIA-PI TIEN VS. LEONIE ASHLEY OOSTROM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Amend Judgment And To Amend Abstract Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT LEONIE OOSTROM Motion To Amend Judgment And To Amend Abstract Of Judgment is continued to January 7, 2020. Defendant to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than December 20, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment And For Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment And Accounting Related To Partition
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line . PLAINTIFF REEF SHAFER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment And For Entry Of Interlocutory Judgment And Accounting Related To Partition Hearing required. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line . PLAINTIFF REEF SHAFER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions is DENIED because of Defendant's response on November 23, 2019.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. ALFREDO GREGORY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line . DEFENDANT ALFREDO GREGORY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleged conduct constituting a nuisance under SFRO § 37.9(a)(3). =(501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line . DEFENDANT HILDA SOTO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleged conduct constituting a nuisance under SFRO § 37.9(a)(3). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line . DEFENDANT SHARAD JAIN Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings is OFF CALENDAR. Request for Dismissal filed by Plaintiff on November 8, 2019.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN P LUCKNER VS. JOSE MENDOZA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT JOSE MENDOZA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Defendant failed to sufficiently allege a cause of action under SFRO §37.9(a) and failed to include Rent Board Form 1007 in the Sixty-Day Notice to Quit as required by SFRO § 37.9(c). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1321 QUESADA AVE 007, LLC VS. TERESITA POBRE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 02, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT TERESITA POBRE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff is not bringing the present action under Section 37.9(a) or (b) of the San Francisco Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance, and thus, Plaintiff's failure to serve Rent Board Form 1007 is not fatal to the Complaint. =(501/REQ)
